creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169772
Upgrade to 3.3.4, use SourceForge and .tar.xz

Two weeks after Bug #206510 was closed upgrading the port to 3.3.3, the new version appeared upstream -- with substantial ChangeLog.

The patch upgrades to 3.3.4 and switched MASTER_SITES to SourceForge.
